data.title: SC5 fix: rename Phase 8 to Primary Ticket Closure
data.description:
## Context
SC5 requires Phase 8 renamed from 'Epic Closure' to 'Primary Ticket Closure'.
Current: Phase 8 is named 'Session Close'.

## Changes
1. Rename Phase 8 header to 'Primary Ticket Closure'
2. Update any internal references

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Phase 8 header contains 'Primary Ticket Closure'
- [ ] No 'Epic Closure' or 'Session Close' as Phase 8 name
- [ ] Verify: grep 'Primary Ticket Closure' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
